market_context: X sentiment is cautiously bullish with traders highlighting low VIX at 16.71 and QQQ's 2.3% 5-day gain amid AI rotation. Pre-market futures point to a flat-to-up open with NVDA and TSLA seeing positive options flow. No major macro events today but crypto weakness may weigh on risk appetite.

predictions.reasoning: SPY closed at 744.25 with positive 5-day momentum and VIX declining 14%. X chatter shows dip-buying in indices. Expect modest end-of-day gain barring surprise news.
NVDA benefits from continued AI narrative on X and options flow favoring calls. Recent price action shows resilience above 200. Target modest upside by close.
TSLA faces profit-taking after strong run; X volume shows more bearish mentions today. Crypto correlation and lack of catalysts point to intraday weakness.
BTC closed lower on 5-day chart and X sentiment reflects risk-off rotation into equities. ETH outperformance may pressure Bitcoin further by close.
